---
description: Documentation language - all project documentation, ADRs and code comments are written in English.
applyTo: "**/*.md,**/*.mdx,docs/**/*.puml,**/*.adoc"
---

# Documentation Language - Numnia

- All project documentation, ADRs, commit messages, PR descriptions, code comments and changelogs are written in **English**.
- Use British or US English consistently within a single document; American English is the default for the project.
- Keep terminology aligned with the SRS glossary in `docs/Requirements.md`.
- Stable identifiers (`UC-XXX`, `FR-...`, `NFR-...`, `ADR-NNN`, `BR-...`) are language-neutral and must not be translated or renumbered.

## Out of scope

- In-product UI text targeted at children or parents follows the rule in `ui-language.instructions.md` (Swiss High German).
